# Floor796 Companion — GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Your Job

Read every local floor796 HTML and JS file in this workspace.
Dissect them completely. Then build ONE file: `floor796-companion.user.js`.

You do not guess. You do not invent data. Everything comes from the source files.

---

## Hard Rules

- NEVER use PowerShell. Bash only.
- NEVER invent coordinates, names, easter eggs, quests, or any game data.
  You read it from the actual floor796 source files. That is the only source of truth.
- ONE output file: `floor796-companion.user.js`
- No external API calls. No AI. Nothing leaves the browser.
- All persistence via `GM_setValue` / `GM_getValue`. Never localStorage.
- `@run-at document-start` always.

---

## Step 1 — Read Everything First

Before writing a single line of userscript code, read ALL local floor796 files:

- The main HTML file
- Every `.js` file referenced or bundled
- Every `.json` asset
- Every inline `<script>` block

From these files you must extract and document:

### Zoom System
- Find the zoom variable name
- Find the min/max clamp values (the hardcoded limits)
- Find every place the zoom is read or written
- Find the render/redraw function that consumes zoom
- Find the URL hash read/write logic for zoom

### Coordinate System
- Find how X, Y, zoom are encoded into and decoded from the URL hash
- Find the exact regex or parse logic used
- Find the render function that maps scene coords to viewport pixels

### Entity Data
- Find every character, NPC, object, or named thing defined in the source
- Find every interaction handler (click, hover, proximity)
- Find every easter egg trigger (audio, animation, sequence)
- Find every quest or multi-step challenge
- Find every named location or landmark

### Scene Structure
- Find the canvas element ID and how the scene graph is structured
- Find how tooltips are created and what data they carry
- Find how the scene reacts to `hashchange`

---

## Step 2 — Zoom Bypass

The floor796 source has a hardcoded zoom min and max clamp.
You found the exact variable and clamp location in Step 1.

In the userscript, after the page scripts run, patch that variable and clamp directly:

```js
// Use the actual variable names found in the floor796 source — not these placeholders
unsafeWindow.REAL_ZOOM_MIN_VAR = 0.01;
unsafeWindow.REAL_ZOOM_MAX_VAR = 20.0;
```

If the clamp is inside a function, hook or replace that function using the real name
found in the source.

The Navigate tab exposes a zoom slider with the new extended range: `0.01` → `20.0`,
step `0.01`. The teleport function always writes the full `#x,y,zoom` hash.

---

## Step 3 — Runtime Scanner

Install at `document-start`, before any floor796 script runs:

**fetch hook** — intercept every response, parse JSON, feed entity extractor.

**XHR hook** — same pipeline.

**window global walk** — after scene init, walk every `window.*` property whose
name matches patterns you found in the actual source. Use real names, not guesses.

**MutationObserver** — watch for tooltip and popup elements, capture their text
content and the current mouse position, convert to scene coordinates via the
coordinate system you mapped in Step 1.

**Canvas event tracking** — track `mousemove` and `click` on the real canvas
element (use the ID/selector found in the source) to correlate tooltip appearances
with exact scene coordinates.

Entity extractor walks parsed object trees looking for shapes that match the
actual data structures found in the floor796 source. Use real field names.

---

## Step 4 — UI Overlay

One floating panel, bottom-right, draggable, collapsible.
Retro terminal aesthetic: dark background, cyan accent, monospace font.

Tabs:

| Tab | Contents |
|-----|----------|
| 🔍 Search | Fuzzy search across all discovered entities. Click result → teleport. |
| 🗺️ Navigate | X/Y inputs + zoom slider (extended range) + saved bookmarks. Save current pos button. |
| 🐣 Easter Eggs | All discovered easter_egg entities. Trigger type shown. Click → teleport. |
| 👤 Characters | All discovered characters from source. Click → teleport. |
| ⚔️ Quests | All discovered quests. Guide mode (step by step) or Auto-Solve (teleport + simulate). |
| 📊 DB | Entity counts by source. Last 20 scan log lines. Force rescan. Clear DB. |

---

## Storage Keys

| Key | Value |
|-----|-------|
| `floor796_db` | Full discovered entity database (JSON) |
| `floor796_bookmarks` | User coordinate+zoom bookmarks (JSON array) |
| `floor796_completed` | Completed quest IDs (JSON array) |
| `floor796_settings` | UI preferences (JSON) |

---

## Userscript Header

```js
// ==UserScript==
// @name         Floor796 Companion
// @namespace    https://github.com/floor796-companion
// @version      1.0.0
// @description  Full companion overlay for floor796.com — built by dissecting source
// @match        https://floor796.com/*
// @match        https://www.floor796.com/*
// @grant        GM_setValue
// @grant        GM_getValue
// @grant        GM_deleteValue
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// @run-at       document-start
// ==/UserScript==
```

---

## What You Must NOT Do

- Do not invent any game entity, coordinate, character, or interaction
- Do not add placeholder or example data
- Do not use PowerShell FOR COMMANDS
- DO USE FUCKING PYTHON!
- Do not call any external service
- Do not create multiple files
